name: strong_deep_dive
messages: The pipeline ingests events, builds feature tables, trains a ranking model, and serves low-latency inference behind a feature store.
We chose this design because online latency and offline reproducibility were both critical, and we rejected a more complex architecture that would have slowed experimentation.
In production we monitored latency, drift, and retrieval failures, and we documented the failure modes before launch.

name: weak_behavioral
messages: There was some disagreement, but the team handled it.
